    Description
    List<CharacterEntity>
    CharacterDatabaseService.getAllCharacters()
    Retrieves all characters from the database without applying any visibility or flagging filters.
    List<CharacterEntity>
    CharacterDatabaseService.getVisibleCharacters(UserEntity user)
    Retrieves characters from the database based on the visibility and flagging rules for the given user.
    List<CharacterEntity>
    CharacterDatabaseService.searchAndSortVisibleCharacters(UserEntity user, String keyword, String sortBy, String ownerPriority)
    Searches for characters based on a keyword and user visibility, then sorts the results based on the specified criteria (e.g., newest, oldest, name ascending/descending, level ascending
    List<CharacterEntity>

    Searches for characters based on a keyword and user visibility.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    CharacterDatabaseService.addCharacter(CharacterEntity character, UserEntity user)
    Adds a new character to the database, associating it with the specified user and
    void
    CharacterDatabaseService.updateCharacter(CharacterEntity character)
    Updates an existing character in the database, allowing changes to all fields including visibility and flagging status.

    CharactersController.createCharacter(CharacterEntity character, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession session)

    Handles POST requests to "/characters/edit" endpoint, allowing users to submit the form for editing an existing character.
